title: 60 Ticks
description: 60 Ticks is a mod based of 60 seconds that makes it so you need to grab supplies within 60 seconds and go into the bunker and survive for as long as you can
body:
![60TicksLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d22425a34332b37d1974c48e6facc357b4e87661.png)
# Description ---------------------------
- 60 Ticks is a mod based of 60 seconds that makes it so you need to grab supplies within 60 seconds and go into the bunker and survive for as long as you can
- **This mod is recommended for Hardcore Mode**
- If you want to play the recommended modpack, Click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/60-ticks-modpack)
- **_This mod is in very early development, expect changes and some bugs_**
